author: Aryan Bhosale
name: 11L Full SOTA Stack + Score-First TTT (1xH100)
blurb: 11-layer transformer with LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, SmearGate, BigramHash(10240), TrigramHash(4096), Value Residual, Gated Attention, XSA-all-11, Partial RoPE(16/64), int6+GPTQ-lite+zstd-22. Score-first TTT with frozen embeddings, per-layer LR groups, cosine schedule. Validated on 1xH100 via 30-experiment autoresearch loop.
